root_text.an5.4:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.4:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu assaddho hoti, ahiriko hoti, anottappī hoti, kusīto hoti, duppañño hoti.
root_text.an5.4:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.4:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an5.4:2.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saddho hoti, hirīmā hoti, ottappī hoti, āraddhavīriyo hoti, paññavā hoti.
root_text.an5.4:2.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an5.4:1.1: “Mendicants, a mendicant with five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.4:1.3: It’s when a mendicant is faithless, shameless, imprudent, lazy, and witless.
translation_text.an5.4:1.4: A mendicant with these five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.4:2.1: A mendicant with five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.4:2.3: It’s when a mendicant is faithful, conscientious, prudent, energetic, and wise.
translation_text.an5.4:2.4: A mendicant with these five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
